creator: mita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
japanese/vfxdvi300/patches/patch-aa should also updated 
according to a small version up from VFlib-2.24.0 to 2.24.1.

diff -rcN japanese/vfxdvi300.sent-pr/patches/patch-aa japanese/vfxdvi300/patches/patch-aa
*** japanese/vfxdvi300.sent-pr/patches/patch-aa	Wed Dec 16 21:44:46 1998
--- japanese/vfxdvi300/patches/patch-aa	Wed Dec 16 23:59:03 1998
***************
*** 396,402 ****
    #endif
    
    #ifdef	Use_ZEIT
! ! DEFAULT_FONTCONFDIR=/usr/local/share/VFlib/2.24.0
  ! DEFAULT_FONTCONF=$(DEFAULT_FONTCONFDIR)/vfontcap
    #ifdef	Use_NTTZEIT
    ZEIT_DEFS=-DUSE_ZEIT -DNTTZEIT -DDEFAULT_FONTCONF=\"$(DEFAULT_FONTCONF)\"
--- 396,402 ----
    #endif
    
    #ifdef	Use_ZEIT
! ! DEFAULT_FONTCONFDIR=/usr/local/share/VFlib/2.24.1
  ! DEFAULT_FONTCONF=$(DEFAULT_FONTCONFDIR)/vfontcap
    #ifdef	Use_NTTZEIT
    ZEIT_DEFS=-DUSE_ZEIT -DNTTZEIT -DDEFAULT_FONTCONF=\"$(DEFAULT_FONTCONF)\"
---
MITA Yoshio
